title: Wire user and order services together
author: eval-bot

context_units.diff_patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+from services.order_service import OrderService
+
+
+class UserService:
+    def __init__(self):
+        self.orders = OrderService()
+
+    def get_user_orders(self, user_id):
+        return self.orders.for_user(user_id)

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+from services.user_service import UserService
+
+
+class OrderService:
+    def for_user(self, user_id):
+        user = UserService().get_user_orders(user_id)
+        return user

raw_diff_chunks.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+from services.order_service import OrderService
+
+
+class UserService:
+    def __init__(self):
+        self.orders = OrderService()
+
+    def get_user_orders(self, user_id):
+        return self.orders.for_user(user_id)

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+from services.user_service import UserService
+
+
+class OrderService:
+    def for_user(self, user_id):
+        user = UserService().get_user_orders(user_id)
+        return user

expected_findings.title: Circular dependency between user and order services
expected_findings.rationale: user_service imports order_service while order_service imports user_service, creating a circular dependency and tight coupling between the two modules.

expected_findings.title: Mutual recursion across coupled services
expected_findings.rationale: OrderService.for_user calls back into UserService.get_user_orders which delegates to OrderService, producing infinite mutual recursion driven by the circular coupling.
